steps.name: locator.check(//frame[@src="frame_3.html"] >> internal:control=enter-frame >> //iframe >> internal:control=enter-frame >> internal:role=radio[name="Hi, I am the UI.Vision IDE"i])
locator.check(//frame[@src="frame_3.html"] >> internal:control=enter-frame >> //iframe >> internal:control=enter-frame >> internal:role=radio[name="I am a human"i])
locator.click(//frame[@src="frame_3.html"] >> internal:control=enter-frame >> //iframe >> internal:control=enter-frame >> //span[contains(text(), "Well, now I know :-)")] >> nth=1)
